data.title: 国际服违规账号封禁 #35
data.summary: [10/8 (Tue) Ban Notice] We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-g
data.body:
[10/8 (Tue) Ban Notice]
We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system in Total Assault and the transaction system.

▶ Total number of players banned: 5
📷  Period: Permanent 
📷https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3220&thread=2659264
#BlueArchive
